capabilities_used.evidence: 多次直接使用“liquidity”语言：2024-05-31 写“Worst possible scenario is a liquidity sweep below daily support before it takes off”；2025-07-31 写“untapped liquidity at 120-122k... this liquidity would be swept”。图表中也反复画出先扫下方/上方流动性再反转的路径。
2024-07-31 明确说“when btc.D hits at the arrow , we should have a solid alt rally”；2025-01-20 说“BTC .D ... at a local resistance... Anticipating a rejection here first”，把 BTC.D 当作山寨轮动开关。

2024-09-18 结合利率决议部署“anticipate a solid bounce from 57.5K area to 60-62k again after interest rate announcement before a dump”；2025-07-31 写“Yall shorted FOMC innit ? ... Gotta be patient to short”。他明显交易 FOMC 前后波动。
附图 #1 是 BTC 斐波那契回撤/扩展框架，标出 0.786、0.886、1、1.272、1.414、1.618、2、2.272、2.414 等价位，并以 0.382/0.5 一带作为“Final buy level”，说明其常用 fib 做回撤买点和上行目标。
附图 #6 将 109k 一带标为“DEC EXIT”，90k 一带标为“JAN ENTRY”，本质是前结构区/供需翻转区；2024-09-17 也写“Previous resistance can flip to support”，明显使用支撑阻力翻转/ breaker 思路。
总体长期偏多，2024-12-09 写“Unless we have a daily close below 88K , There is no break in structure”；2025-02-28 说“we are still on track for 220k $BTC”；多次把下跌视作回调而非熊市。
他的更新里几乎总有失效位：2024-03-24“Below 63k invalidates my plan”；2024-12-09“daily close below 88K”；2025-12-15“Invaldation 93.7K+ Daily close”；2026-04-01 还因“.7% sl”选择离场。
2024-08-30 展示小账户并强调“Trading is a game of probabilities”；2026-04-01 提到“.7% sl”；2025-01-20 反复警告不要在事件点高杠杆，说明其交易体系包含明确仓位与风险约束。
虽未在摘录中高频出现 DXY 原词，但其 2024-10-10、2025-04-29 等内容常把 CPI、GDP、宏观数据与 BTC 节奏绑定，属于宏观风险偏好框架的一部分；其更偏事件化而非纯指标化使用。
2024-02-09 图表文字明确写“Fed mentioned they dont pivot in March... So when Fed cuts , Markets cool down around May , Economy picks up and with halving , bull run begins”；2024-09-18 也围绕 25/50bps 决议交易 BTC。
2024-02-09 图中直接把“with halving , bull run begins”纳入年度剧本；多条推文把 2024-2025 放在更大的牛市阶段中处理，不把中途深回撤视为周期结束。
2025-02-28 说“we are still on track for 220k $BTC ... After 2025 , we may retouch 2021 top at 64-69k”；这是一种典型牛顶后大级别回撤的 4 年周期叙事。
他常提醒不要被短期价格动作骗到：2024-06-27“don’t fooled by price action”；2024-10-10“folks are gonna start shorting here . $BTC is likely gonna punish late shorts”；附图 #7 XLM 为典型压缩末端，隐含假跌破/假突破后真方向。
附图 #6 BTC 日线画出收敛上升通道后给出向下插针再向上冲的路径，其中“Short entry”就在楔形末端，说明他会把上升楔形视为先跌再走趋势的结构。
2025-04-30 明说“A bear flag and a head and shoulders is forming at previous high 94.9k”；说明他不仅看大级别多头，也会在局部用经典延续/反转形态做空。
同样在 2025-04-30 明确点名“head and shoulders is forming at previous high 94.9k”，可见会将局部复杂反转形态纳入入场逻辑。

2024-10-11 说“$BTC is still choppy and swing trades in either direction are risky . So we are only trading level to level”；2026-03-30 也写“Until the monthly close ... we are trading in a small range”，说明震荡期偏向做区间而非追单边。
2024-07-31 写“your liquidations were planned by whales”；2024-07-31 另一条说“Look where they placed the limit orders and understand what liquidated you”；其叙事核心就是价格先去扫一侧止损/清算池。
2026-04-11 专门发“ETF FLOWS: Spot ETFs saw broad inflows... BTC: $240M ETH: $64.9M...”，说明近阶段已把 ETF 流量当作辅助确认。
2025-04-30 说“Waiting at lows with a big capital to deploy... Let it dump”；他的做法不是无脑抄底，而是等到预设低位/紫色区域/关键支撑再接。
2025-01-17 预期“two blow off tops one at 150-160k and another at 220k”；2025-02-28 继续坚持 220k super cycle 叙事，明显在用抛物线冲顶/双顶峰剧本。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Historical Fractal Analog
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maps the current cycle to a prior regime or year and projects a path using structural similarity rather than strict pattern rules.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把当前周期映射到历史年份/历史牛市结构，基于相似路径做目标位和时间窗口推演，而不是只看单一形态。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-01-17：“I applied a fractal from 2017 and that’s how I predicted the Jan bottom”；同日还说预期两个 blow-off tops。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Election / Inauguration Seasonal Playbook
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses U.S. election timing, inauguration week, and post-election month counts as repeatable timing windows for crypto positioning.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把美国大选、总统就职、选后月份窗口当作加密市场的重复性时间锚来部署仓位。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-28：“Markets peaks 6 months post election”；2025-01-20 多条围绕 inauguration day 做 BTC/ETH 部署；2024-01-26 也强调 election year volatility。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Monthly / Quarterly Close Magnet
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 月线/季线收盘磁吸玩法
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treats month-end and quarter-end closes as liquidity events that often pin price, create fake moves, or define the next week's direction.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把月末和季末收盘视为流动性事件，认为价格常在这些节点被牵引、制造假动作，并决定接下来一周方向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“Monthly , quarterly close in 10 mins ! If it’s bullish , it retraces on first week of July before rally”；2025-07-31：“Monthly close today ! Anticipate volatility”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fixed Calendar Accumulation Window
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses specific recurring calendar dates as statistical accumulation windows, independent of short-term noise.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用每年固定日期附近作为统计意义上的建仓窗口，不被短线噪音干扰。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-09-17：“Personally , I’m buying next week . Sep 20-23 . I’ve been buying for over a decade on this date”；2024-07-31 还引用 W.D. Gann 的 Sep 23 季节性。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Whale Manipulation / Orderbook Intent Read
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 鲸鱼操盘与订单簿意图解读
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Reads market moves as deliberate whale-engineered liquidity hunts using orderbook placement, liquidation pockets, and timing traps.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把市场走势解读为鲸鱼通过订单簿、清算位和时间节点主动设计的流动性猎杀。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“market is heavily manipulated , run by algorithms... see what they are doing on the orderbook”；2024-07-31：“your liquidations were planned by whales”。

personal_quirks.quote: Stick to the plan and don’t shake . Keep calm and hodl
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大级别剧本一旦建立，不因中途波动轻易改计划；现货仓位允许承受回撤。

personal_quirks.quote: Trading is a game of probabilities . Nobody can 100% predict it right all the time
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 接受不确定性，以概率和仓位管理替代确定性预言。

personal_quirks.quote: Please anticipate volatility at 10:00 AM EST
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他非常在意具体时间点，把某些宏观/事件时刻当成日内波动触发器。

personal_quirks.quote: you make most money when market dumps
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把大跌视为高赔率机会，而不是纯粹风险；偏向在恐慌中部署。

personal_quirks.quote: don’t play with leverage during inauguration and get hurt !
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 重大事件窗口降低杠杆或不用杠杆，尤其现货和合约分开处理。

unique_traits: 他不是单纯画形态的 TA 号，而是把历史分形、美国政治日历、月末季末收盘、BTC.D 轮动和流动性猎杀整合成一套叙事型交易框架。与一般 TA 交易员不同，他极度强调“剧本”和时间窗口，常提前几天甚至几个月给出路径图，再用无效位和事件节点管理执行。整体上长期偏多，但短线能非常战术性地做空，核心是先扫流动性再走主趋势。

high_conviction_phrases: There is no break in structure
we are still on track for 220k
There is no resistance in this area on the fib
